scenarios.description: outputSettings(non-null) sets the document's outputSettings field and returns this when Validate.notNull passes
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("base"); OutputSettings newSettings = new OutputSettings();
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the same Document instance; doc.outputSettings() == newSettings
pseudocode: Document doc = new Document("base"); OutputSettings newSettings = new OutputSettings();
assert result == doc; assert doc.outputSettings() == newSettings;

scenarios.description: outputSettings(null) throws IllegalArgumentException when Validate.notNull fails
